ddl.where: "source" = 'evaluation' AND "drafted_at" IS NULL AND "trace_id" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: scores_canonical_evaluation_trace_idx

ddl.where: "issue_id" IS NOT NULL AND "drafted_at" IS NULL
ddl.name: scores_issue_lookup_idx

ddl.where: "drafted_at" IS NULL AND "errored" = false AND "passed" = false AND "issue_id" IS NULL
ddl.name: scores_issue_discovery_work_idx
